title: Modern Map Tooltip
description: Displays the map component in the tooltip
body:
A mod that lets you view map contents in the tooltip with some extra customisation.

![The mod being used](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52e1117c9136dff79a5b4040456ea5dbc36aafbd.png)

In order to open the config menu, use the command ```/modernmaptooltip config```

To toggle this mod on and off in game type ```/modernmaptooltip toggle```

To change the scale of the map in the tooltip type ```/modernmaptooltip scale <1 to 15>```

To view the current scale type ```/modernmaptooltip scale``` with no arguments (only for versions 1.2+)

This mod provides more customisability, but if you want a similar mod for Fabric, Forge and Neoforge for almost any version you can think of, try [Map Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip)

## Config

To open the config menu, use the command ```/modernmaptooltip config```

The configuration file is saved at ```<your minecraft directory>/modernmaptooltip.config``` but all the customisation can be done in game as well.

## Note

The contents of maps are only usually only sent to the client when the map is in your inventory, and consequently unknown maps in chests will not display.
